---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(sp)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(lwgeom)
library(ggplot2)
library(geobr)
library(ggrepel)
```
```{r}
data_verif <- st_read('D:/Desktop/bella_bella/APP/filtragem_tentativa/dados_filtrados.shp')

groupby_imov <- st_read('D:/Desktop/bella_bella/APP/filtragem_tentativa/groupby_codimovel.shp')
```

```{r}
## rename 
groupby_imov <- groupby_imov%>%
  rename(
  total_app = ttl_r_p,
  modulo_fiscal = mdl_fsc,
  area_total = are_ttl
)


```

```{r}
fitofisionomia <- st_read('D:/Desktop/Dados-Geo-Espaciais/Fitofisionomia/Klein_7classes.shp')
```
```{r}
data_transform <- st_transform(groupby_imov,
                               32722)
```

```{r}
st_crs(data_transform) == st_crs(fitofisionomia)
```

```{r}
intersection <- st_join(
  data_transform,
  fitofisionomia,
  join = st_intersects
)
```
```{r}
st_write(intersection,
        '../../APP/agora_vai/Fitofisio_APP_CAR.shp')
```
```{r}
fitofisio_sc_geom <- intersection %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(fid) %>%
  summarise(count_app = n(),
            mean_app = mean(total_app),
            sum_app = sum(total_app),
            sum_mf = sum(modulo_fiscal),
            )
```
```{r}
## Merge back in shapefile from IBGE
fito_sc_merge <- fitofisionomia %>%
  left_join(fitofisio_sc_geom, by = c("fid" = "fid"))
```
```{r}
st_write(fito_sc_merge,
         '../../APP/filtragem_tentativa/fito_sc_merge.shp')
```


## AGGREGATE
```{r}

```


```{r}

```

```{r}

```


```{r}
# Get the positions
agg_by_fito_ordered <- agg_by_fito_ordered %>% 
   mutate(csum = rev(cumsum(rev(sum_app))), 
         pos = sum_app/2 + lead(csum, 1),
         pos = if_else(is.na(pos), sum_app/2, pos),
         rounde_area_app = round(sum_app/1000)
         )

ggplot(agg_by_fito_ordered,
       aes(x = "" ,
           y = sum_app,
           fill = name_fito)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  geom_label_repel(aes(y = pos, label = paste0(rounde_area_app, "1e3")),
                   size = 4.5, nudge_x = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Fitofisionomia - ha")) +
  theme_void()
```
```{r}


ggplot(agg_by_fito_ordered,
       aes(x = "" ,
           y = sum_app,
           fill = name_fito)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  geom_label_repel(aes(y = pos, label = round(sum_app)),
                   size = 3.5, nudge_x = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Fitofisionomia - ha")) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}

ggplot(agg_by_fito_ordered,
       aes(x = "" ,
           y = sum_app,
           fill = name_fito)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  geom_label_repel(aes(y = pos, label = round(sum_app)),
                   size = 3.5, nudge_x = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Fitofisionomia - ha")) +
  theme_void()
```
